rule: CanUserAccessProfile gate: ProfileUserMapping row must exist for (profileId, userId). GetProfileUserMapping returns null → access denied.
UpdateProfile requires SuperAdmin OR role CustomerSetup OR role ManageProfiles. All three checked before update proceeds.
Cross-customer profile edit: only SuperAdmin can edit a profile belonging to a different customer (CurrentCustomerId != command.CustomerId). Non-admin gets ForbidWithMessage.

Field truncation on save: SMSSendAs.Truncate(100), EmailSendAs.Truncate(200), BenchmarkDisplayName.Truncate(50), Sms2InternalDisplayName.Truncate(50). Enforced in ValidateProfile before every insert/update.
File upload size limit: sizeKb >= 15360 (15 MB) → BadRequest. Checked before blob storage write.
File type validation: FileTypeIdFromExtension returns 0 for unknown extension → BadRequest. ContentType must be non-empty. Enforced before any storage operation.
DateLastUpdatedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow set on every UpdateProfile call. Set in ProfileService.UpdateProfile, not in controller.
File access guard: SuperAdmin OR CanUserAccessProfile check before download/delete of ProfileStorageFile. ForbidWithMessage on failure.

if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.

RULE[pdf:Brugervejledning-administration.pdf]: User licenses are purchased separately. Each extra user login costs 50 DKK/month. Customer has a fixed number of user licenses tied to their subscription package.

RULE[pdf:Brugervejledning-administration.pdf]: Admin-managed user roles (visible in UI) include: 'Admin menu - Kundeopsætning', 'Admin menu - Søgning', 'Admin menu - Standardmodtager', 'Admin menu - Tekstskabeloner', 'Admin menu - Tilmeld/afmeld', 'Admin menu - Web-beskeder', 'Menu - Kan se statusrapporter', 'Opsætning - Kan redigere og oprette brugere', 'Opsætning - Kan redigere og slette udsendelser (kladde og planlagte beskeder)'.

RULE[wiki:Domain-Description/Profiles.md]: ProfileRoleGroup (package) = TEMPLATE only. Assigning a group to a profile at creation time applies those roles. CHANGING the group later does NOT update already-assigned profiles.
RULE[wiki:Domain-Description/Profiles.md]: ProfileType options: Water, Waste water (Spildevand), Electricity (El), Heating (Fjernvarme), Renovation, + blank/general purpose.
RULE[wiki:Domain-Description/Profiles.md]: ProfileRolePrices table — each ProfileRole has associated pricing. Capability model directly links to subscription billing.

RULE[wiki:Domain-Description/Customers.md]: Customer has child entities: CustomerAccount, CustomerFtpSettings, CustomerSamlSettings, CustomerSubscriptionSettings, CustomerApiKey (multiple), CustomerGdprResponsible (multiple), CustomerLog.
